channel.title: HHH — Smart money 13F moves · HoldLens
channel.description: Every 13F move on HHH (Howard Hughes Holdings) by the 30 tracked portfolio managers — buys, adds, trims, exits — as filed with the SEC. Updated after each quarterly filing wave. Not investment advice.

item.title: Joel Greenblatt: ADDED HHH (+125%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Joel Greenblatt (Gotham Asset Management) added HHH in Q4 2025 · 0.0% of portfolio.
item.author: noreply@holdlens.com (Joel Greenblatt)

item.title: Polen Capital: TRIMMED HHH (-41%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Polen Capital (Polen Capital Management) trimmed HHH in Q4 2025 · 0.0% of portfolio.

item.title: Bill Ackman: TRIMMED HHH (-4%) · Q4 2025
item.description: Bill Ackman (Pershing Square Capital) trimmed HHH in Q4 2025 · 12.7% of portfolio. Small trim on Howard Hughes.
